metadata.description: ACSM-sourced fitness skills for body composition, rep max estimation, and macronutrient planning

plugins.name: fitness-tools
plugins.description: 3 specialized fitness skills providing body composition assessment (Durnin-Womersley, Jackson-Pollock 3/4/7-site), one-rep max estimation (ACSM percentage table), and macronutrient meal planning (ectomorph, mesomorph, endomorph body types). Powered by the fitness-tools Python library.
